creator: ngie@FreeBSD.org
text:
MAINTAINERS doesn't always get read by humans before commits are made, which suggests (to me) that this could be automated based on the contents of the file from FreeBSD src tree.

I would like to formalize its use with Phabricator -- I just need to know what formats MAINTAINERS needs to be digested as so I can make the necessary conversions (if needed) to make it so.
